div1.entryFree: Repair, subst. restoration, renovation: whose fresh r. if now thou not renewest, Sonn. 3, 3. what holier than, for royalty's r., to bless the bed of majesty again with a sweet fellow, Wint. V, 1, 31. even in the instant of r. and health, John III, 4, 113. whose (our laws') r. and franchise shall be our good deed, Cymb. III, 1, 57.
